caption: They can see more of your internet activity than most people realize. Freedom DNS acts like a private protection layer for your connection: it helps reduce tracking, improves safety against malicious domains, and is especially useful on public Wi-Fi when networks feel sketchy or unstable. If you want more control and less risk while browsing, this is a simple one-tap upgrade. Try Freedom DNS today, link in bio. #privacy #dns #publicwifi #mobilesecurity #cyberhygiene
title: Freedom DNS - What It Does
